raw_text: The app is okay, but I wish there was a dark mode for the analytics dashboard. My eyes hurt reading these charts at night.
Exception: NullReferenceError in PaymentProcessingService. User id=9942 attempted to check out but stripe_session_token was null. StackTrace: at api.v1.checkout(line 42).
Hey, every time I try to update my profile picture, the app freezes and I have to force close it. I'm using the latest iOS version. My email is user@example.com.
Gateway Timeout 504 on endpoint /api/v2/inventory/sync. Database query took longer than 15000ms. Consider adding database indexing to the product_id column.
